title: koelreuteria elegans subsp. formosana
intro: Koelreuteria elegans subsp. formosana, also known as the Taiwanese goldenrain tree or Formosan pagoda tree, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Koelreuteria elegans subsp. formosana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, and further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
